original text:
#BeautifulPainMovie (#Redha), first Malaysian film tackle about subject autism.
feature directing debut, Tunku Mona Riza delivers quiet, compassionate look condition which afflicts children, according World Health Organization.
Upon learning that their only Danial, autism, mother, Alina father, Razlan's world suddenly crumbles.
Razlan devastated son's condition inability accept truth about their being different with rest children, causes friction within family, Alina's perseverance maternal instinct help wade through difficult times raising Danial.
With hardly knowledge about this condition, they struggle confront harsh realities challenges raising autistic child.
With Sasha, sister close friend side, they have found improve Danial's quality life until tragic accident causes family re-think strategy.
Beautiful Pain chosen National Film Development Corporation Malaysia (Finas) official Malaysian entry Best Foreign Language Film 89th Academy Awards unfortunately nominated.
Some major scenes Redha were shot location beautiful beach Terengganu's Redang Island.
also worthwhile mention that parents Danial movie namely Alina Razlan, played June Lojong Namron, husband wife real life.
